name: Door schedule extraction
description: Extract the door schedule from the architectural schedule sheet and output to Excel (Holabird Academy K-8 School, Baltimore MD)

inputs.user_prompt: Extract the door schedule from the Holabird Academy door schedule sheet (A-3.2) and output to Excel

expected_behavior: Locates the door schedule region on the sheet (not the window or finish schedule)
Extracts all rows without missing entries or duplicating rows
Cell values match the drawing exactly (door marks, sizes, types)
Produces a valid .xlsx file that opens correctly
Writes a graph finding entry with correct metadata
ground_truth_notes: Manually transcribed from the drawing. Each row is one door. Merged cells expanded.

completeness.description: abs(extracted_rows - actual_rows) / actual_rows â†’ 1.0 means perfect match

accuracy.description: Cells matching ground truth / total cells

format.description: Valid xlsx, correct headers, data starts in correct row

graph.description: Finding written to agent_findings with correct type and source sheet
